# Contributing to The Signal

Thanks for your interest in contributing.

## Project Structure

/public
Frontend interface

/data
Content index

/tools
Publishing utilities

## Development Goals

The Signal explores decentralized publishing using:

* IPFS storage
* local AI workflows
* minimal static web interfaces

## Contribution Types

We welcome:

* bug fixes
* documentation improvements
* UI enhancements
* IPFS integration improvements
* publishing pipeline improvements

## Getting Started

1. Fork the repository
2. Create a new branch
3. Make changes
4. Submit a pull request

Please keep changes focused and small.
